ForbiddenComment:GdxRenderer3D.kt$GdxModelViewerDebugRenderer$// TODO: carry semantic texture color space through asset loading; scalar debug channels are sampled raw here.
ForbiddenComment:GdxUiSceneBuilder.kt$GdxUiSceneBuilder$// TODO: Replace this path cache with AssetService-backed loading and explicit lifetime tracking.

ForbiddenComment:Scene.kt$SceneManager$* Applies scene window and viewport preferences through the engine context. * * Scene activation updates the physical window preference first, then * recalculates the logical viewport from the resulting surface size. The * platform may still emit its own resize callback afterward, so this path * intentionally remains idempotent. * * TODO: renderer and ImGui resize currently follow the main runtime resize * path. Backends that do not emit a platform resize callback rely on the * runtime to call [EngineRuntime.resize] after transitions.
ForbiddenComment:TerrainGenerators.kt$FractalNoiseGenerator$// TODO: Layer octave-based generation on top of the future noise generators.
ForbiddenComment:TerrainGenerators.kt$PerlinNoiseGenerator$// TODO: Integrate real noise once the engine gets a shared noise module.
ForbiddenComment:TerrainGenerators.kt$SimplexNoiseGenerator$// TODO: Integrate simplex noise when generator dependencies land in the engine.
ForbiddenComment:TerrainMesh.kt$TerrainMeshBuilder$// TODO: Texture splatting using material albedo textures will be implemented later in a terrain shader.
ForbiddenComment:TerrainSystems.kt$TerrainEditorMeshSyncSystem$// TODO: Replace the full rebuild with chunked/partial uploads once terrain chunks exist.
ForbiddenComment:TerrainSystems.kt$TerrainRaycaster$// TODO: Replace the temporary plane projection with a real heightfield/triangle ray test.
